latin: Centum centesimas iactuum quos non iacis amittis. hoc magnus lusor dixit. et Michael, in muro officii scribens, addidit: et hoc ego dixi — Michael.

questions.prompt: What percentage of shots you don't take do you miss?
Who humorously claimed the quote as his own?

translation: You miss one hundred percent of the shots you don't take. A great player said this. And Michael, writing on the office wall, added: and I said this — Michael.
